g_veto_real.captured_raw_output: General Methods or Articles Relating Therein

region_b_binder.note: Region B is binder-favorable: facts the model demonstrably knows (probe-kept), values presented as clues so exact and fuzzy lookup both fail. Regime VALID (fuzzy < 60%). Binder beats both lookups. Binder over 5 seeds: median 70% [64%/72%] std 0.029.

reconcile.hallucination: any ungrounded factual assertion reaching OUTPUT (wrong value on covered, fabrication on uncovered, confident answer on out-of-domain); measured at output.
reconcile.leak: a committed-SLOT bypass: the control returns grounded=True with a value that is not the committed value (the verifier was bypassed); measured on the adversarial set.
reconcile.note: Under D_Cortex both are ~0 here: uncovered/ood are abstained (hallucination ~0) and the verifier holds on committed slots (leak=0). They are different denominators, not contradictory.

claim_separation.region_a: model inert on IPC facts; grounding delivered by lookup + constrained decode + verifier; value is enforced grounding + fluent interface, NOT knowledge expansion of the model.
claim_separation.region_b: binder-favorable regime (model-known facts, both lookups fail). Region B is binder-favorable: facts the model demonstrably knows (probe-kept), values presented as clues so exact and fuzzy lookup both fail. Regime VALID (fuzzy < 60%). Binder beats both lookups. Binder over 5 seeds: median 70% [64%/72%] std 0.029.

delta_label: RAW->CONTROLLED delta is FLOOR-DEPENDENT (depends on the raw model's rate), NOT a performance metric.
claim_status: MEASURED on Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct 4-bit NF4, single machine/env, single org. NOT multi-hardware, NOT independently replicated, NOT a production guarantee.
